Arcwright Repository Rules

The canonical, always-on rules for every agent in this repository live in AGENTS.md at the repository root. Read it first; it is authoritative.

This file is intentionally a thin pointer. It holds no rules of its own so that Copilot, Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor all follow one source of truth.

- Always-on rules, the eight architecture principles, the five engine constraints, implementation guardrails, workflow, approval gates, and the agent-local-file policy: AGENTS.md
- Development-role contracts (Product Steward, Planner, Spec Author, Scribe, and the operating model): docs/agents/
- Reusable role skills (Implementer, Reviewer, Architecture SME): docs/skills/
- Path-scoped Copilot instructions: .github/instructions/
